title: Resume Clinic Case Note
text:
## Resume Clinic Case Note

**Client:** {person}

**Objective:** Replace the {adjective} resume summary with something less like a {noun}.

**Experience translated:** "Helped with {plural noun}" became "coordinated {adjective} operations while {verb ending in -ing}."

**Skills added:** {verb}, customer service, and safely operating a {object} near a {place}.

**Concern:** Gap in work history caused by {number} months of {emotion} and a {adjective} {animal}.

**Plan:** Employment specialist will {verb} edits {adverb} and send applications by {day of week}.
